lore.wanteditems.bottle_cap: Maximizes one random IV stat when used on a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bottle_cap_hp: Maximizes the HP IV to 31 when used on a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bottle_cap_atk: Maximizes the Attack IV to 31 when used on a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bottle_cap_def: Maximizes the Defense IV to 31 when used on a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bottle_cap_spa: Maximizes the Special Attack IV to 31 when used on a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bottle_cap_spd: Maximizes the Special Defense IV to 31 when used on a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bottle_cap_spe: Maximizes the Speed IV to 31 when used on a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.gold_bottle_cap: Maximizes ALL IV stats to 31 when used on a Pokemon. The ultimate training item.
lore.wanteditems.copper_bottle_cap: Sets ALL IV stats to 0 when used on a Pokemon. Use with caution!
lore.wanteditems.sweet_chocolate_hp: Increases HP IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.sweet_chocolate_atk: Increases Attack IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.sweet_chocolate_def: Increases Defense IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.sweet_chocolate_spa: Increases Special Attack IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.sweet_chocolate_spd: Increases Special Defense IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.sweet_chocolate_spe: Increases Speed IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bitter_chocolate_hp: Decreases HP IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bitter_chocolate_atk: Decreases Attack IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bitter_chocolate_def: Decreases Defense IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bitter_chocolate_spa: Decreases Special Attack IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bitter_chocolate_spd: Decreases Special Defense IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.bitter_chocolate_spe: Decreases Speed IV by 1 when fed to a Pokemon.
lore.wanteditems.gender_swapper: Swaps the gender of a Pokemon between Male and Female.
lore.wanteditems.shiny_swapper: Toggles the shiny status of a Pokemon on or off.
lore.wanteditems.caught_ball_swapper: Changes which Poke Ball a Pokemon appears to have been caught in.
lore.wanteditems.ev_randomizer: Randomizes all EV stats of a Pokemon. Results may vary!
lore.wanteditems.iv_randomizer: Randomizes all IV stats of a Pokemon. Feeling lucky?
lore.wanteditems.level_randomizer: Randomizes the level of a Pokemon. High risk, high reward.
lore.wanteditems.red_lucky_egg: Right-click to hatch and receive a random Pokemon!
lore.wanteditems.green_lucky_egg: Right-click to hatch and receive a random Pokemon!
lore.wanteditems.blue_lucky_egg: Right-click to hatch and receive a random Pokemon!
lore.wanteditems.shiny_lucky_egg: Right-click to hatch and receive a guaranteed Shiny Pokemon!
lore.wanteditems.red_lucky_box: Right-click to open and receive a random item!
lore.wanteditems.green_lucky_box: Right-click to open and receive a random item!
lore.wanteditems.blue_lucky_box: Right-click to open and receive a random item!
lore.wanteditems.cobblemon_lucky_box: Right-click to open and receive a random Cobblemon item!
lore.wanteditems.poke_ball_lucky_box: Right-click to open and receive a random Poke Ball!
lore.wanteditems.berry_lucky_box: Right-click to open and receive a random Berry!
lore.wanteditems.exp_candy_lucky_box: Right-click to open and receive random Exp. Candy!
lore.wanteditems.ditto_residue: A mysterious substance left behind by Ditto. Used in breeding.
lore.wanteditems.move_activator: Activates a Pokemon's move outside of battle.
